description: These slip-on Roman sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the slouchy knot design. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.UpperLeather straps on the forefoot and slouchy strap around the ankle attached by a midfoot strapMetallic embellishments on the forefoot strapsSoft leather lining for added comfortZippered opening on the back of the heel for added comfortSynthetic footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortEngraved design for added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
